title: acaena × gracillima
intro: Acaena × gracillima, also known as the variegated caterpillar plant, is a hybrid species within the Acaena genus of flowering plants in the carrot family. It is a small, spreading perennial with distinctive leaves featuring white or silver variegation on a green background. Acaena × gracillima has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and has been reported to offer health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved digestive health.
